Description: Add a local image-embedding abstraction with DINOv2 as the default Epic 2 backend.

Stories.StoryDescription: Introduce an image-embedding abstraction that can support DINOv2 now and future SigLIP2 or OpenCLIP backends later.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The codebase exposes a stable image embedder interface and config surface for Epic 2.

Stories.StoryDescription: Implement a local DINOv2 ViT-B/14 embedder with configurable model identifier, device selection, and batch size.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a working default DINOv2 image-embedding backend for Epic 2.

Stories.StoryDescription: Normalize all generated embedding vectors so cosine-distance comparisons are stable and consistent.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Embedding vectors are normalized before they are used by clustering logic.

Stories.StoryDescription: Use a mock image embedder in automated tests so no real model runs are required for unit or integration coverage.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover embedding-driven clustering without invoking a real model.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add a skipped manual benchmark-style test path for trying the real DINOv2 embedder on a real day folder when requested.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The repo contains an opt-in manual benchmark path for real-model embedding evaluation.
